name: Geotech Holdings Ltd.
summary: Geotech Holdings Ltd., an investment holding company, provides construction and engineering services, and property-related services in Hong Kong. It undertakes slope works and ground investigation field works as a contractor and subcontractor. The company undertakes landslip preventive/remedial works to slopes/retaining walls; site formation works; general civil works, including road drainage and sewer, geotechnical, and ground investigation field works; and metal scaffolding works. It also provides property management consultancy services to property owners. The company serves government departments, railway operators, property owners and developers, and professional consultants. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. Geotech Holdings Ltd. is a subsidiary of Star Merit Global Limited.
